cms_data_api.notes: Public CMS Data API. No API key is required for public datasets.

provider_data_catalog_api.notes: Provider Data Catalog API for Medicare.gov provider comparison datasets.

nppes_api.notes: Public NPI Registry API. Uses version 2.1.

pac_hospice_latest.name: Medicare Post Acute Care Utilization Hospice
pac_hospice_latest.free_use_boundary: Public use file. Good for market share proxies, not exact referral source flow.

inpatient_provider_service_latest.name: Medicare Inpatient Hospitals by Provider and Service
inpatient_provider_service_latest.free_use_boundary: Public Original Medicare inpatient discharge summary data. Good for opportunity scoring, not actual hospice referral proof.

hospice_provider_data.name: Hospice Provider Data
hospice_provider_data.free_use_boundary: Public quality and provider comparison data. Not a referral source dataset.

hospice_general_information.name: Hospice General Information
hospice_general_information.free_use_boundary: Public provider characteristics. Useful for enrichment, not referral flow.

nursing_home_provider_information.name: Nursing Home Provider Information
nursing_home_provider_information.free_use_boundary: Public nursing home characteristics and quality data. Good for opportunity scoring, not actual referrals.

nppes_npi_registry.name: NPPES NPI Registry API
nppes_npi_registry.free_use_boundary: Public NPI records. NPI issuance does not validate licensure or credentialing.

restricted_or_not_free_sources.beneficiary_level_medicare_claims: Requires approved CMS research access, DUA, fees, or a licensed data vendor.
restricted_or_not_free_sources.ccw: Restricted research warehouse, not a free public MCP source.
restricted_or_not_free_sources.vrdc: Secure research environment with approval and user fees.
restricted_or_not_free_sources.casper_iqies: Role based provider access. Not open public data.
restricted_or_not_free_sources.raw_oasis_or_hope_assessments: Patient level assessment data is restricted. Public quality measures can be used instead.
restricted_or_not_free_sources.exact_referral_leakage: Not freely published by CMS. Requires internal referral data, approved claims data, or paid analytics.
